seoTitle: Manyung vs Mapoon — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Manyung and Mapoon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Manyung and Mapoon.
heading: Manyung vs Mapoon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Manyung, Queensland and Mapoon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Manyung (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Manyung or Mapoon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Manyung has a flood risk score of 56/100, while Mapoon scores 27/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Manyung scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Mapoon scores 26/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Manyung or Mapoon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mapoon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
